common.tagline: Your trusted partner for all your financial projects

hero.title: Your trusted partner for all your financial projects
hero.subtitle: Access flexible and fast financing solutions tailored to your needs

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete financial solutions for all your projects

personalLoan.title: Personal Loan
personalLoan.description: Get up to €500,000 for your personal projects with competitive rates and a simplified process.

projectFinancing.title: Project Financing
projectFinancing.description: Finance your entrepreneurial, real estate or commercial projects with our expertise and partners.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable Financing
nonRefundable.description: Access grants and financial aid to develop your business without repayment obligation.

businessSupport.title: Business Support
businessSupport.description: Specialized financing solutions for SMEs and startups with personalized support.

testimonials.title: Our Client Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Discover how we helped our clients achieve their projects

testimonial1.name: Marie Dupont
testimonial1.text: Zenith Finance allowed me to finance my business creation project in just 2 weeks. Very professional and responsive team!

testimonial2.name: Juan García
testimonial2.text: Excellent service. The Zenith Finance team was very attentive and helped me get the financing I needed for my business.

testimonial3.name: Klaus Mueller
testimonial3.text: Very professional and reliable. Zenith Finance helped me finance my real estate project. I can only recommend them!

testimonial4.name: Sophie Martin
testimonial4.text: Fast and efficient service. I received my financing in less than a month. Very satisfied with my experience with Zenith Finance.

testimonial5.name: Marco Rossi
testimonial5.text: Zenith Finance offered me the best financing conditions. I am very satisfied with the service and professionalism of the team.

testimonial6.name: Anna van der Berg
testimonial6.text: Very satisfying. Zenith Finance provided me with the financing I needed for my large project. Highly recommended!

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple and transparent process in 3 steps

step1.title: Fill Out the Form
step1.description: Complete our application form in a few minutes with your personal information and project details.

step2.title: Application Review
step2.description: Our team of experts reviews your application and contacts you within 24 hours with a response.

step3.title: Receive Funds
step3.description: Once approved, funds are transferred directly to your account within 2-3 business days.

partners.title: Our Banking Partners
partners.subtitle: We work with the best financial institutions

about.title: About Zenith Finance
about.introduction: Zenith Finance is a leading financing company in Europe, specializing in providing innovative and accessible credit solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Make financing accessible to everyone by offering fast, transparent solutions tailored to each need.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: Become Europe's trusted financial partner, recognized for our excellence, innovation, and commitment to our clients.

values.title: Our Values
values.transparency: Transparency: We communicate clearly on all terms and conditions.
values.innovation: Innovation: We use the latest technologies to improve our services.
values.trust: Trust: Our clients' trust is our greatest asset.
values.excellence: Excellence: We are committed to providing superior quality service.

ceo.name: Thomas Bergström
ceo.bio: With over 15 years of experience in the financial sector, Thomas leads Zenith Finance towards innovation and growth.

cfo.name: Elena Rossi
cfo.bio: Expert in financial management and strategy, Elena ensures the soundness and stability of our operations.

coo.name: Lars Nielsen
coo.bio: Specialist in process optimization, Lars ensures the efficiency and quality of our services.
